question: Will the Fed cut rates at June 2026 FOMC?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Fed cuts rates at June 2026 meeting.

question: Will WHO end COVID-19 PHEIC by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if WHO ends PHEIC by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will Starship reach orbit by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Starship reaches stable orbit by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will US GDP exceed 3% in Q3 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if annualized Q3 GDP >= 3.0%.

question: Will an AI model exceed 90% on MMLU by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a major lab announces >90% on MMLU-Pro by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will S&P 500 close above 7000 by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if S&P 500 closes at or above 7000 by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will a new COVID VOC be designated in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if WHO designates a new VOC in 2026.

question: Will ECB launch digital euro pilot by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if ECB launches digital euro pilot by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will global temperature exceed 1.5C in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if 2026 global avg temp exceeds 1.5C above pre-industrial.

question: Will a US state pass comprehensive AI regulation by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any state passes comprehensive AI regulation bill by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will US inflation stay above 3% through 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if average monthly CPI is above 3% for 2026.

question: Will Apple release a smart ring by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Apple announces or releases a smart ring by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will UN pass a binding AI resolution in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if UN General Assembly passes a binding AI resolution in 2026.

question: Will Tesla deliver 2M+ vehicles in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Tesla reports 2M+ deliveries for 2026 fiscal year.

question: Will there be a US government shutdown in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if US federal government shuts down for any period in 2026.

question: Will Bitcoin exceed $150k in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Bitcoin price exceeds $150,000 at any point in 2026.

question: Will FDA approve a new Alzheimer's drug in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if FDA approves a novel Alzheimer's treatment in 2026.

question: Will Japan's Nikkei 225 exceed 45000 in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Nikkei 225 closes above 45000 in 2026.

question: Will fusion energy reach Q>10 milestone in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any fusion experiment achieves Q>10 in 2026.

question: Will EU implement Carbon Border Tax by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if EU CBAM is fully implemented by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will Waymo launch commercial robotaxi in Europe by Dec 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Waymo operates paid robotaxi in a European city by Dec 31, 2026.

question: Will OPEC+ cut production by 1M+ bpd in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OPEC+ announces production cut of 1M+ bpd in 2026.

question: Will US-China trade war escalate with new tariffs in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if US or China imposes new tariffs in 2026.

question: Will a malaria vaccine achieve >80% efficacy in Phase 3?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a malaria vaccine candidate reports >80% efficacy in Phase 3 trial in 2026.

question: Will UK GDP avoid recession in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if UK avoids two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth in 2026.

question: Will NASA announce Artemis III crew in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if NASA announces the crew for Artemis III lunar mission in 2026.

question: Will global coal consumption peak in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if global coal consumption declines year-over-year in 2026.

question: Will DOJ win a major antitrust case against Big Tech in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if DOJ wins a final ruling against Google, Apple, Amazon, or Meta in 2026.

question: Will a robot pass a medical licensing exam in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if an AI system passes the USMLE or equivalent in 2026.

question: Will Germany trigger the EU debt brake reform in 2026?
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Germany agrees to EU debt brake reform in 2026.
